CustomField.description: Regex pattern for matching field values. For REGEX_PATTERN: regex pattern to match the value (e.g., \d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4} for SSN format). For EXACT_FIELD: not used (use FieldApiName__c instead).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Required for REGEX_PATTERN match type. Enter regex to match field VALUES. Example: \d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4} matches SSN format. Not used for EXACT_FIELD.
CustomField.label: Match Pattern
